title: Relics of Ruin
description: A custom weapon system featuring boss-themed swords with unique abilities and mechanics.
body:
⚔️ Relics of Ruin
Wield the power of ancient entities.

• About the Mod
Relics of Ruin introduces a collection of powerful, ability-based swords inspired by ancient and mysterious entities. Each relic is infused with unique powers, allowing players to unleash devastating attacks and dominate combat in entirely new ways. Harness the energy of the Warden, Wither, Ender Dragon, and Elder Guardian and turn their abilities into your own.

 
⚔️ Legendary Weapons
1) Echo Blade (Warden Inspired)
Sonic Boom → Unleash a piercing ranged attack
Shockwave Blast → Release a powerful area knockback
Designed for control and precision combat

2) Rib Reaver (Wither Inspired)
Wither Barrage → Fire rapid withering projectiles
Wither Domain → Create a deadly decay zone
Ideal for damage-over-time and crowd control

3) Void Slayer (Ender Dragon Inspired)
Dragon Dash → Dash forward with destructive force
Void Domain → Summon a zone of void energy
Built for aggressive and high-mobility combat

4) Aqua Bound (Elder Guardian Inspired)
Ocean Burst → Release a powerful water explosion
Guardian Beam → Fire a continuous energy beam
Balanced for ranged and environmental combat

• Features
- Unique active abilities for each weapon
- Entity-inspired combat mechanics
- High-impact visual and gameplay effects
- Survival-friendly design
- Distinct playstyles for each blade
